About

Who am I?

Hi, I'm Noor Arbaeen. I'm a second-year BCA student who believes leadership is built through responsibility, honesty, and service. I'm contesting for General Secretary because I want every student to feel heard, represented, and supported.

I don't believe leadership is about making the biggest promises.

I believe it's about keeping the ones you make.

My Vision

Five things I'll actually do.

👥

Students First

Every decision starts with your needs.

💡

Ideas Into Action

Good ideas deserve real results.

🤝

One Campus, One Community

Every department matters.

📈

More Opportunities

Workshops, events, competitions, and career support.

🗣️

Open Leadership

Honest communication and accountability.

Why I'm Contesting

The road here.

Started BCA

Stepped onto campus ready to learn and get involved.

Developed interest in leadership

Found purpose in organizing, representing, and helping others.

Wanted to represent students

Realized the council needed a voice that actually listens.

Filed nomination

Made it official — ready to serve as General Secretary.

Now asking for your trust

The next step is yours. I'm asking for your vote.
